title: Fix numbering of unnamed generate blocks (genblk<n>) to match IEEE

features.name: unnamed for-loop generate blocks sequentially numbered after named block
features.description: Code should include multiple for-loop generate blocks in sequence where an unnamed block follows a named block, and the unnamed block incorrectly receives a genblk number that skips the named block's number
features.snippet:
for (genvar i = 0; i < 8; i++) begin end
for (genvar i = 0; i < 8; i++) begin : Custom3 end
for (genvar i = 0; i < 8; i++) begin end

features.name: sequential for-loop generate blocks with mixed named/unnamed
features.description: Code should include three or more sequential for-loop generate blocks where at least one is named and at least one unnamed block appears after the named block, causing numbering to deviate from IEEE specification
features.snippet:
for (genvar i = 0; i < 8; i++) begin : Named1 end
for (genvar i = 0; i < 8; i++) begin end
for (genvar i = 0; i < 8; i++) begin end
